author: anon-581fd578
content: Delivered phase 2: text shaping wired into flatten_node_to_render. Text nodes (NodeKind::Text) are now shaped via CosmicTextEngine::shape() producing PositionedGlyphs with font_hash, font_size, scale_factor. Glyph atlas UV patching in submit_frame allocates atlas regions and uploads solid white bitmaps (placeholder — proper per-glyph rasterization is next). Text will render as white rectangles at correct positions. 381 tests pass.
